name: obsidian-cli
description: Bridges Claude to the official Obsidian CLI: run commands, Dataview queries via eval, plugin APIs, graph view, and more against the running Obsidian app.

vault_name.title: Default vault name
vault_name.description: Vault targeted when a command doesn't specify one (appended as vault=<name>). Leave empty to always specify the vault per command.

obsidian_bin.title: Obsidian CLI path
obsidian_bin.description: Path to the obsidian CLI binary installed by the app. macOS default: /usr/local/bin/obsidian. Linux: ~/.local/bin/obsidian. Windows: Obsidian.com next to Obsidian.exe.
